{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Executive",
  "description": "Ascentech Services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Executive

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Summary


	An automobile company is seeking a highly motivated and creative Marketing Executive with experience in the automotive industry to support the planning and execution of marketing activities across its automotive brands.
	The ideal candidate will assist in driving brand visibility, customer engagement, and campaign effectiveness through strategic marketing initiatives and coordinated promotional activities.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	B.Sc. or HND in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in marketing, digital marketing, or brand management.
	Prior experience in the automotive industry is an added advantage.
	Strong communication, interpersonal, and presentation skills.
	Analytical thinking with the ability to interpret market trends and campaign data.
	Good knowledge of digital marketing tools, SEO, social media marketing, and email marketing.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and marketing tools/software.
	Ability to multitask, work under pressure, and meet deadlines.
	Creative mindset with strong attention to detail.


Salary
N250,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should Send their CV to: cv@ascentech.com.ng using &ldquo;Marketing Executive &ndash; VI, Lagos&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-16",

  },

Marketing Executive Job at Ascentech Services Limited




        
    

        
        Ascentech Services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Executive

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	An automobile company is seeking a highly motivated and creative Marketing Executive with experience in the automotive industry to support the planning and execution of marketing activities across its automotive brands.
	The ideal candidate will assist in driving brand visibility, customer engagement, and campaign effectiveness through strategic marketing initiatives and coordinated promotional activities.


Requirements & Qualifications


	B.Sc. or HND in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	1–3 years of experience in marketing, digital marketing, or brand management.
	Prior experience in the automotive industry is an added advantage.
	Strong communication, interpersonal, and presentation skills.
	Analytical thinking with the ability to interpret market trends and campaign data.
	Good knowledge of digital marketing tools, SEO, social media marketing, and email marketing.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and marketing tools/software.
	Ability to multitask, work under pressure, and meet deadlines.
	Creative mindset with strong attention to detail.


Salary
N250,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should Send their CV to: [email protected] using “Marketing Executive – VI, Lagos” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Associate",
  "description": "mDoc is a digital health social enterprise that leverages behavioral science, technology and quality improvement methodologies to provide improve access to quality healthcare for people with chronic health needs. Our goal is to augment the knowledge and capability of healthcare providers and health consumers to ensure longer, happier and healthier lives across sub-Saharan Africa. mDoc aims to further build capability and to support physicians to provide education and tools to patients to improve self-management.

Our ethos is etched in the belief that augmenting the healthcare &amp; technology landscape is paramount to helping Africa unlock its true potential. We are on a mission to transform how African healthcare consumers receive the support they need to live longer, healthier, happier and more productive lives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Associate

Job Location: Lagos
Work mode: Onsite

Job Description


	In this position, you will be a part of the team cohort providing direct (virtual and in-person) self- management support services to different cohorts of members.
	You will be expected to provide supportive oversight to a number of projects ensuring the operations are seamless and helping to interface with external stakeholders in and out of the country.
	Along with the mDoc leadership team, you will cultivate an environment reflecting the values of mDoc Healthcare, including respect for our members and team members.
	Providing optimal member-centred care and experience is of critical importance to mDoc so we are looking for people who embody this in mind and action.
	You must be data-driven or willing to be data-driven. Given we are a technology firm; you will use digital tools to work plan, manage projects track, predict our success as well as manage our members and customers.
	Also, given mDoc is a startup, there will likely be some fluidity to responsibilities.


Responsibilities


	Assist in implementation of project activities in accordance with the work plan.
	Use Jira and other technology tools to proactively manage the team&#39;s complex plans
	Lead the daily huddles with the clinical and management team
	Prepare administrative documents, collect and compile inputs to documents as well as analyze financials and develop budgets
	Collect, compile, and organise background materials, documents and other materials for meetings
	Performs reporting as needed; compiles data, and generates reports and decks as needed
	Create monthly plans for virtual training needs and plan for resource
	Initiates meetings with stakeholders and team, prepares communication to summarize discussions and action items in meetings - internal and client meetings.
	Manage logistics with external partners and stakeholders for tele-education programs and other efforts.
	Document meeting discussions and decisions into meeting minutes and follow up on post-meeting action items as designated during project meetings.
	Conduct reviews of projects for action items and recommend solutions.
	Provide general assistance to the program and project team(s) as needed.
	Distribute communications related to program and project plan activities.
	Schedule meetings for program and project plan activities.
	Compile and publish weekly project status reports for leadership and project sponsors, project teams and other key project stakeholders.
	Collaborate and problem solve cross-functionally.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 5-7 years of experience in project or operations management, business or economics
	Master&#39;s Degree preferred
	Interest or experience in health preferred. Business background preferred and consulting experience preferred.
	Excellent problem solving, communication and &quot;person-centered&quot; skills
	High level of organizational management capability and prioritization as well as the ability to break the &#39;big picture&#39; into step wise different pieces.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications especially excel, powerpoint, microsoft word
	Ability to establish and maintain effective and healthy working relationships with co- workers, managers and clients
	Ability to perform several tasks simultaneously to meet deadlines is necessary with high attention to detail
	Demonstrates ability to work with confidential and sensitive data and experience with technology tools.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: mdoc_recruiting@mymdoc.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-20",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "mDoc Healthcare"
    
  },

Project Associate Job at mDoc Healthcare




        
    

        
        mDoc is a digital health social enterprise that leverages behavioral science, technology and quality improvement methodologies to provide improve access to quality healthcare for people with chronic health needs. Our goal is to augment the knowledge and capability of healthcare providers and health consumers to ensure longer, happier and healthier lives across sub-Saharan Africa. mDoc aims to further build capability and to support physicians to provide education and tools to patients to improve self-management.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Our ethos is etched in the belief that augmenting the healthcare & technology landscape is paramount to helping Africa unlock its true potential. We are on a mission to transform how African healthcare consumers receive the support they need to live longer, healthier, happier and more productive lives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Associate

Job Location: Lagos
Work mode: Onsite

Job Description


	In this position, you will be a part of the team cohort providing direct (virtual and in-person) self- management support services to different cohorts of members.
	You will be expected to provide supportive oversight to a number of projects ensuring the operations are seamless and helping to interface with external stakeholders in and out of the country.
	Along with the mDoc leadership team, you will cultivate an environment reflecting the values of mDoc Healthcare, including respect for our members and team members.
	Providing optimal member-centred care and experience is of critical importance to mDoc so we are looking for people who embody this in mind and action.
	You must be data-driven or willing to be data-driven. Given we are a technology firm; you will use digital tools to work plan, manage projects track, predict our success as well as manage our members and customers.
	Also, given mDoc is a startup, there will likely be some fluidity to responsibilities.


Responsibilities


	Assist in implementation of project activities in accordance with the work plan.
	Use Jira and other technology tools to proactively manage the team's complex plans
	Lead the daily huddles with the clinical and management team
	Prepare administrative documents, collect and compile inputs to documents as well as analyze financials and develop budgets
	Collect, compile, and organise background materials, documents and other materials for meetings
	Performs reporting as needed; compiles data, and generates reports and decks as needed
	Create monthly plans for virtual training needs and plan for resource
	Initiates meetings with stakeholders and team, prepares communication to summarize discussions and action items in meetings - internal and client meetings.
	Manage logistics with external partners and stakeholders for tele-education programs and other efforts.
	Document meeting discussions and decisions into meeting minutes and follow up on post-meeting action items as designated during project meetings.
	Conduct reviews of projects for action items and recommend solutions.
	Provide general assistance to the program and project team(s) as needed.
	Distribute communications related to program and project plan activities.
	Schedule meetings for program and project plan activities.
	Compile and publish weekly project status reports for leadership and project sponsors, project teams and other key project stakeholders.
	Collaborate and problem solve cross-functionally.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree with 5-7 years of experience in project or operations management, business or economics
	Master's Degree preferred
	Interest or experience in health preferred. Business background preferred and consulting experience preferred.
	Excellent problem solving, communication and "person-centered" skills
	High level of organizational management capability and prioritization as well as the ability to break the 'big picture' into step wise different pieces.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications especially excel, powerpoint, microsoft word
	Ability to establish and maintain effective and healthy working relationships with co- workers, managers and clients
	Ability to perform several tasks simultaneously to meet deadlines is necessary with high attention to detail
	Demonstrates ability to work with confidential and sensitive data and experience with technology tools.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Gbenga Badejo and Co - Our client is a leading paper manufacturing company committed to producing high-quality and sustainable paper products for local and international markets, driven by innovation and excellence, delivers reliable products that support businesses, education, and industrial growth is seeking the services of a Book Keeper.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bookkeeper

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Essential Duties and Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records (general ledger, journals, and subsidiary ledgers)
	Record daily financial transactions (sales, purchases, receipts, payments)
	Manage accounts payable and receivable
	Prepare bank reconciliation statement
	Prepare trial balances and assist in month-end and year-end procedures
	Generate financial reports (profit &amp; loss, balance sheet, cash flow)
	Operate and manage accounting systems such as QuickBooks, Sage, SAP.
	Configure chart of accounts and accounting workflows within the software
	Ensure accurate data entry and system integrity
	Perform software updates, backups, and basic troubleshooting
	Use spreadsheets (Excel, Google Sheets) for financial analysis, forecasting, and reconciliations
	Maintain digital filing systems and ensure secure data storage
	Implement and monitor internal controls within IT systems.


Education and Experience


	A Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting or related courses from a reputable educational institution.
	A minimum of 3 yearsexperience worof king as a Book Keeper or in similar role.
	Knowledgeable in the use of ERP like QuickBooks, Sage, Zoho, SAP etc.
	Outstanding organizational and time management skills.
	Familiarity with office gadgets and IT applications.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Ability to use discretion and maintain confidentiality.
	Membership of AAT will be an added advantage.
	Applicants residing on the mainland are preferred.


Compensation


	This is a full-time role with competitive salary.

Bookkeeper Job at Gbenga Badejo & Co




        
    

        
        Gbenga Badejo and Co - Our client is a leading paper manufacturing company committed to producing high-quality and sustainable paper products for local and international markets, driven by innovation and excellence, delivers reliable products that support businesses, education, and industrial growth is seeking the services of a Book Keeper.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bookkeeper

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Essential Duties and Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records (general ledger, journals, and subsidiary ledgers)
	Record daily financial transactions (sales, purchases, receipts, payments)
	Manage accounts payable and receivable
	Prepare bank reconciliation statement
	Prepare trial balances and assist in month-end and year-end procedures
	Generate financial reports (profit & loss, balance sheet, cash flow)
	Operate and manage accounting systems such as QuickBooks, Sage, SAP.
	Configure chart of accounts and accounting workflows within the software
	Ensure accurate data entry and system integrity
	Perform software updates, backups, and basic troubleshooting
	Use spreadsheets (Excel, Google Sheets) for financial analysis, forecasting, and reconciliations
	Maintain digital filing systems and ensure secure data storage
	Implement and monitor internal controls within IT systems.


Education and Experience


	A Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting or related courses from a reputable educational institution.
	A minimum of 3 yearsexperience worof king as a Book Keeper or in similar role.
	Knowledgeable in the use of ERP like QuickBooks, Sage, Zoho, SAP etc.
	Outstanding organizational and time management skills.
	Familiarity with office gadgets and IT applications.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Ability to use discretion and maintain confidentiality.
	Membership of AAT will be an added advantage.
	Applicants residing on the mainland are preferred.


Compensation


	This is a full-time role with competitive salary.


Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Our client in the Engineering and Construction Sector is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Essential Duties and Responsibilities


	That will manage the accounts and accounts processes of the organization
	Carry out account&rsquo;s reconciliation.
	Provide support for the management to raise and manage funds for project execution.
	Manage cash flow and liquidity for effective project execution.
	Ensure accuracy of records and prepare financial statements and reports.
	Develop and manage annual budgeting and compliance.
	Ensure proper records are kept for a financial transaction.
	Maintain internal controls, financial policies and procedures.
	Provide financial guidance to the management for informed decision-making.


Education and Experience


	A Bachelor Degree in Accounting or related courses from a reputable educational institution
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant industry experience (at least 3 years in consulting firm)
	Strong leadership and commercial acumen
	Excellent planning and highly organized.
	A self-starter, MUST BE ABLE TO WORK WITHOUT SUPERVISION.
	Proficient in MS Word Office applications &ndash; Excel, PowerPoint and Word.
	Good understanding and experience with systems of control.
	Strong and analytical skills include the ability to spot, assess and address risk, materiality and interdependencies and translate it into impact analysis for financial reporting and recommendations for improvement.
	Adaptable to working in a fast-paced, ever-changing environment.
	Must be a Chartered Accountant.


Compensation


	This is a full-time role with competitive salary.

Accountant Job at Gbenga Badejo & Co




        
    

        
        Our client in the Engineering and Construction Sector is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Essential Duties and Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	That will manage the accounts and accounts processes of the organization
	Carry out account’s reconciliation.
	Provide support for the management to raise and manage funds for project execution.
	Manage cash flow and liquidity for effective project execution.
	Ensure accuracy of records and prepare financial statements and reports.
	Develop and manage annual budgeting and compliance.
	Ensure proper records are kept for a financial transaction.
	Maintain internal controls, financial policies and procedures.
	Provide financial guidance to the management for informed decision-making.


Education and Experience


	A Bachelor Degree in Accounting or related courses from a reputable educational institution
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant industry experience (at least 3 years in consulting firm)
	Strong leadership and commercial acumen
	Excellent planning and highly organized.
	A self-starter, MUST BE ABLE TO WORK WITHOUT SUPERVISION.
	Proficient in MS Word Office applications – Excel, PowerPoint and Word.
	Good understanding and experience with systems of control.
	Strong and analytical skills include the ability to spot, assess and address risk, materiality and interdependencies and translate it into impact analysis for financial reporting and recommendations for improvement.
	Adaptable to working in a fast-paced, ever-changing environment.
	Must be a Chartered Accountant.


Compensation


	This is a full-time role with competitive salary.


Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Admin / Event Assistant",
  "description": "MMT Consults is a dynamic Human Resource Consulting and General Services firm dedicated to delivering innovative, practical, and sustainable solutions that empower organizations to achieve excellence. We partner with businesses across diverse sectors to optimize their people, processes, and performance, ensuring growth, efficiency, and long-term success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Admin / Event Assistant

Job Location: Magodo - Shangisha, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary of the Role


	The Admin/Event Assistant will provide administrative and operational support across SP Fusion&rsquo;s daily office functions and event projects. This role requires strong organizational ability, attention to detail, and a proactive attitude to support the smooth execution of corporate and private events.
	The ideal candidate will serve as a bridge between the administrative office and the event operations team, assisting with documentation, logistics coordination, client communication, and general office duties.


Key Responsibilities
Administrative Support:


	Manage day-to-day administrative tasks, including filing, correspondence, and record keeping.
	Assist in preparing official documents, reports, and event-related paperwork.

Admin / Event Assistant Job at MMT Consults




        
    

        
        MMT Consults is a dynamic Human Resource Consulting and General Services firm dedicated to delivering innovative, practical, and sustainable solutions that empower organizations to achieve excellence. We partner with businesses across diverse sectors to optimize their people, processes, and performance, ensuring growth, efficiency, and long-term success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin / Event Assistant

Job Location: Magodo - Shangisha, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary of the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Admin/Event Assistant will provide administrative and operational support across SP Fusion’s daily office functions and event projects. This role requires strong organizational ability, attention to detail, and a proactive attitude to support the smooth execution of corporate and private events.
	The ideal candidate will serve as a bridge between the administrative office and the event operations team, assisting with documentation, logistics coordination, client communication, and general office duties.


Key Responsibilities
Administrative Support:


	Manage day-to-day administrative tasks, including filing, correspondence, and record keeping.
	Assist in preparing official documents, reports, and event-related paperwork.
	Maintain and update internal databases, client directories, and vendor contact lists.
	Support office operations by managing supplies, coordinating deliveries, and ensuring workspace organization.
	Assist in scheduling meetings, preparing minutes, and tracking action points.


Event Coordination Support:


	Assist the Events Team in planning, logistics coordination, and execution of corporate and private events.
	Liaise with vendors, venues, and service providers for quotations, bookings, and follow- ups.
	Support the setup and breakdown of events, ensuring alignment with event design and


Client and Team Support:


	Provide courteous and timely responses to client and vendor communications.
	Support the Principal Consultant and Event Team Lead in documentation and presentation preparation.
	Assist in coordinating team travel logistics, bookings, and on-site support.
	Ensure effective communication between administrative and event units


Documentation & Reporting:


	Support the preparation of event briefs, post-event reports, and evaluations.
	Maintain proper documentation of contracts, invoices, and payment schedules.
	Track project deliverables and follow up on pending approvals or vendor obligations.


Learning & Development:


	Participate in periodic reviews and mentorship sessions to enhance professional growth.
	Read and research materials related to administrative and event management processesto build knowledge and efficiency.
	Demonstrate willingness to learn SP Fusion’s internal systems, brand guidelines, and workflow procedures.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
